content.problemStatement:
You are given an array A1,A2,вЂ¦,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1вЂ‹,A2вЂ‹,вЂ¦,ANвЂ‹ consisting of NNN integers. Your goal is to make the GCD of all the elements in the array an odd integer. To achieve this goal, you can do the following operation any number of times:


Choose an index iвЂ…вЂЉ(1в‰¤iв‰¤N)i\;(1\leq i \leq N)i(1в‰¤iв‰¤N) such that Ai>1A_i \gt 1AiвЂ‹>1 and set Ai=вЊЉAi2 вЊ‹A_i = \lfloor \frac{A_i}{2}\ \rfloorAiвЂ‹=вЊЉ2AiвЂ‹вЂ‹ вЊ‹
You can choose an index multiple times during the operations. Find the minimum number of operations after which GCD of all the elements in the array becomes an odd integer.

**Note:** вЊЉxвЊ‹\lfloor x \rfloorвЊЉxвЊ‹ : Returns the largest integer that is less than or equal to xxx (i.e  rounds down to the nearest integer). For example, вЊЉ1.5вЊ‹=1,вЊЉ2вЊ‹=2,\lfloor 1.5 \rfloor = 1, \lfloor 2 \rfloor = 2,вЊЉ1.5вЊ‹=1,вЊЉ2вЊ‹=2, вЊЉ72 вЊ‹\lfloor \frac{7}{2}\ \rfloorвЊЉ27вЂ‹ вЊ‹ вЂ…вЂЉ=вЊЉ3.5вЊ‹\;= \lfloor 3.5 \rfloor=вЊЉ3.5вЊ‹ вЂ…вЂЉ=3\;= 3=3.


Input Format

The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,вЂ¦,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1вЂ‹,A2вЂ‹,вЂ¦,ANвЂ‹.


Output Format
For each test case, print a single line containing one integer - the minimum number of operations after which GCD of all the elements in the array becomes an odd integer.
constraints: Sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed  5в‹…1055\cdot10^55в‹…105

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: The GCD of all integers in the array is already 111, which is odd.
Test case 222: You choose the index i=2i = 2i=2 and set A2=вЊЉ62В вЊ‹=вЊЉ3вЊ‹=3A_2 = \lfloor \frac{6}{2}\ \rfloor = \lfloor 3 \rfloor = 3A2вЂ‹=вЊЉ26вЂ‹В вЊ‹=вЊЉ3вЊ‹=3. So the array becomes [4,3][4, 3][4,3] and the GCD of 444 and 333 is 111.
